title: The Straw Hats Escape
description: Dressrosa’s allies protect Luffy as the crew runs toward departure.
scene: On pages 1–5, Luffy, Rebecca, King Riku, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We're short on time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: - The Navy's Closing in! The Grand Dress- Rosa Escape Operation begins!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you've got something to attend to, make sure you finish it up quick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll be waiting at the Eastern Port!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Zoro- Senpai! That way's South!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I think it's cool how you get lost though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Vicinity of Dress- Rosa's Central District Marine Tent

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've already got all the information together- DARA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The bigshots are already on their way to the location! I'll be taking over command here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Where are those pirates that escaped from that house on the hill!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This way, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The pirates are most likely fleeing for the eastern port!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We should have patrol squads sta- tioned at all ports!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Connect me with the Eastern Port Squad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Eastern Port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Yes, this is the Eastern Port Patrol Squad here! Over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Nothing seems out of the ordinary! Over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: nothing out of the ordinary!? there's no way that can be right, DARA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: the pirates are heading that way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: No, no; it's all under control, we don't even need rein- forecasts or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: You... state your marine code and name at once, soldier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What-? er...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Damn it, Dara! The Eastern Port's been completely compro- missed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Mobiize the pursuit squads to the East Im- Mediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Barto- Lomeo's group

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Go on ahead! The port's not much further!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Spare us your grati- tude!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We already owe you; we don't need any more favors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: We're in Debtor's hell trying to pay you back as it is, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: The criminals that were supposed to be held in the palace have now appeared in the eastern region of the city!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: That means the Palace is completely vacant now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Be- fore the Palace flower fields

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Report- ing from in front of the palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Where are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Why's he over there!? Do not let him slip through your fingers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Straw Hat Luffy has just arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Roger:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: WHATA...? someone outside is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Rebecca! Where are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Calling me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Apprehand Straw Hat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy! Over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: You shouldn't be seen coloring with pirates, Milady. It's not proper.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: There you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Royal Palace, inner garden

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: tank... Do me a favor and call Viola and Rebecca. We're going to go down to the city.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: time for me to announce the return of the Riku Royal family to the throne.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: Yes! I shall return at once!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: I've been waiting for this day for far too long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Kyaa Aah!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: KyaAA AAAH! A pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: He's a pirate but he's also the man that saved this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: A pirate is still a pirate! What to do!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: I'm glad you came! I didn't get to properly thank you, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: That's not why I'm here, dummy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: Are you okay with it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #62
dialogue.text: with WHA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #63
dialogue.text: with what they've done to soldier- San!?

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
